_README: This file is managed by LazyCue (see shelley/lazycue). Do NOT edit by hand — it is the cached, machine-generated DSL for a self-healing browser test. To change behavior, edit the test description and re-run LazyCue.
description: Navigate to /new. Type the text bash: echo "testing tool results" into the message input (data-testid "message-input") and click the send button (data-testid "send-button"). Wait for a completed tool call (data-testid "tool-call-completed") to appear. The bash tool header (".bash-tool-header") should be visible. Initially the details panel (".bash-tool-details") is not visible. Click the header: the details panel should become visible. Click the header again: the details panel should become hidden again.
